title: Anthropic got hit by export rules nobody understands
summary: Anthropic has spent much of this week fighting to get its newest AI models back online after the Trump administration abruptly ordered the company to cut access for all foreign nationals, including users inside the US and its own employees, forcing Anthropic to block access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for everyone. "To my […]
title_es: Anthropic toma offline modelos por restricciones de exportación
bajada: La administración Trump ordenó a Anthropic bloquear acceso a ciudadanos extranjeros de Fable 5 y Mythos 5, forzando la compañía a desconectar modelos globalmente. La acción revela complejidades en aplicar controles de exportación a modelos IA de frontera.
bajada_en: The Trump administration ordered Anthropic to block foreign nationals from accessing Fable 5 and Mythos 5, forcing the company to take models offline globally. The action reveals complexities in applying export controls to frontier AI models.

title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.
title_es: OpenAI diagnostica enfermedades genéticas raras con IA
bajada: Investigadores utilizaron un modelo de razonamiento de OpenAI para identificar 18 nuevos diagnósticos en casos previamente sin resolver de enfermedades genéticas pediátricas. Este avance demuestra el potencial de la IA en medicina de precisión y podría revolucionar el diagnóstico de enfermedades raras.
bajada_en: Researchers used OpenAI's reasoning model to identify 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases of rare genetic diseases in children. This breakthrough demonstrates AI's potential in precision medicine and could transform rare disease diagnosis.

title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.
title_es: IA mejora reacción crítica en síntesis de fármacos
bajada: OpenAI y Molecule.one demostraron cómo un químico autónomo impulsado por GPT optimizó una reacción clave en la síntesis de medicamentos. Este logro acelera la investigación en química medicinal y abre nuevas posibilidades para el descubrimiento de fármacos.
bajada_en: OpenAI and Molecule.one demonstrated how an autonomous AI chemist using GPT optimized a key drug-synthesis reaction. This achievement accelerates medicinal chemistry research and opens new possibilities for drug discovery.

title: Photoshop and Premiere now have AI assistants
summary: Adobe's plan to stick AI assistants into all of its Creative Cloud suite is now fully underway, with new chatbots now rolling out to its biggest editing and design apps. As part of a public beta launching today, Photoshop, Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign, and Frame.io now each have a bespoke AI Assistant that can be used […]
title_es: Adobe integra asistentes IA en Creative Cloud
bajada: Adobe lanza asistentes IA personalizados en Photoshop, Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign y Frame.io en beta pública. Esta expansión integra capacidades generativas en las herramientas creativas más usadas, cambiando el flujo de trabajo de millones de diseñadores.
bajada_en: Adobe launches custom AI assistants in Photoshop, Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign, and Frame.io in public beta. This expansion integrates generative capabilities into the industry's most-used creative tools, transforming workflows for millions of designers.

title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
title_es: IA médica de Google iguala a médicos en manejo de enfermedades
bajada: Un estudio publicado en Nature muestra que AMIE, el sistema conversacional de IA médica de Google, equipara el desempeño de médicos de atención primaria en casos complejos de manejo de enfermedades. Este resultado valida el potencial de la IA conversacional en contextos clínicos reales.
bajada_en: Research published in Nature shows Google's AMIE conversational medical AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management cases. This validates the potential of conversational AI in real clinical settings.

title: General Intuition in talks to raise $300M at around $2B valuation
summary: General Intuition is in talks to raise around $300 million at a roughly $2 billion valuation from backers including Jeff Bezos. The startup trains AI agents on spatial-temporal reasoning.
title_es: General Intuition recauda $300M a valuación de $2B
bajada: La startup General Intuition, especializada en agentes de IA con razonamiento espaciotemporal, está en conversaciones para recaudar $300 millones de dólares con respaldo de inversor clave como Jeff Bezos. El funding refleja creciente interés en agentes IA avanzados con capacidades de razonamiento.
bajada_en: Startup General Intuition, specialized in AI agents with spatial-temporal reasoning, is in talks to raise $300 million with backing from investors including Jeff Bezos. The funding reflects growing interest in advanced AI agents with sophisticated reasoning capabilities.

title: Midjourney goes from generating cat images to full-body ultrasound scans
summary: Midjourney CEO David Holz just showed off the company's first hardware product and plans to build a San Francisco spa, which he admitted is a bit different from the "cat pictures" produced by its AI image generator. Dubbed The Midjourney Scanner, it's an ultrasound-based full-body scanner that uses a ring of sensors to capture vertical […]
title_es: Midjourney lanza primer hardware: escáner ultrasónico
bajada: Midjourney anunció The Midjourney Scanner, su primer producto hardware: un escáner corporal de ultrasonido que usa un anillo de sensores para capturar imágenes verticales completas. El movimiento marca la expansión de la empresa hacia hardware médico de IA.
bajada_en: Midjourney announced The Midjourney Scanner, its first hardware product: a full-body ultrasound scanner using a ring of sensors. The move marks the company's expansion into medical AI hardware.

title: Who decides when AI is too dangerous?
summary: On today’s episode of Decoder, my guest is Hayden Field, senior AI reporter for The Verge. Often when Hayden comes on the show, it’s because something has gone wrong in the world of AI. Last weekend, that something was a pretty intense mix of Anthropic, the Trump administration, and Anthropic’s new AI model, Fable 5.  […]
title_es: ¿Quién decide cuándo la IA es demasiado peligrosa?
bajada: Un episodio de Decoder examina la controversia regulatoria alrededor de Anthropic y sus modelos avanzados Fable 5 bajo la administración Trump. La discusión plantea preguntas fundamentales sobre gobernanza, seguridad y control en modelos de IA de frontera.
bajada_en: A Decoder episode examines the regulatory controversy around Anthropic and its advanced Fable 5 models under the Trump administration. The discussion raises fundamental questions about governance, safety, and control in frontier AI models.

title: The Korean Telecom Giant at the Center of Anthropic’s Mythos Controversy
summary: Days before Anthropic took its most advanced AI models offline, the White House ordered the company to revoke SK Telecom’s access to Claude Mythos over claims of alleged ties to China.
title_es: SK Telecom en centro de disputa regulatoria de Anthropic
bajada: La Casa Blanca ordenó a Anthropic revocar acceso de SK Telecom a Claude Mythos alegando vínculos con China, días antes que modelos avanzados fueran desconectados. El incidente ilustra cómo geopolítica impacta acceso a tecnología IA avanzada.
bajada_en: The White House ordered Anthropic to revoke SK Telecom's access to Claude Mythos citing alleged China ties, days before models went offline. The incident illustrates how geopolitics impacts access to advanced AI technology.

title: The White House Wants Anthropic to Block All Jailbreaks. That May Not Be Possible
summary: Trump administration officials tell WIRED that if Anthropic wants to rerelease Fable 5, it will need to ensure the model's guardrails can't be circumvented. Security experts say that can't be done.
title_es: Casa Blanca pide a Anthropic bloquear todos los jailbreaks
bajada: Funcionarios de Trump demandan que Anthropic asegure que guardrails de Fable 5 no puedan ser eludidos como condición para relanzar el modelo. Expertos en seguridad advierten que eliminar completamente jailbreaks podría ser técnicamente imposible.
bajada_en: Trump administration officials demand Anthropic ensure Fable 5's guardrails cannot be circumvented as condition to relaunch the model. Security experts warn completely eliminating jailbreaks may be technically impossible.

title: Adobe’s redesigned AI studio remembers what your creations look like
summary: Adobe is introducing some new capabilities for its Firefly AI assistant, alongside a "reimagined" AI studio that lets you edit and generate new designs from a single interface. The new Firefly experience launching today in private beta is designed to give you "persistent context, reusable assets, and organized workflows" across your projects, according to Adobe, […]
title_es: Firefly: estudio IA redeseñado de Adobe con contexto persistente
bajada: Adobe presenta una versión reimaginada de su estudio IA Firefly con contexto persistente, assets reutilizables y flujos de trabajo organizados en beta privada. La mejora permite trabajar con coherencia a través de múltiples proyectos de diseño.
bajada_en: Adobe introduces a reimagined Firefly AI studio with persistent context, reusable assets, and organized workflows in private beta. The upgrade enables consistent work across multiple design projects.

title: At Cannes Lions, NVIDIA Partners Reshape Advertising and Marketing With AI
summary: The digital era gave the advertising and marketing industry speed; the AI era is giving it autonomous operations.  For companies building next-generation technologies for advertising and marketing, the question is no longer whether to adopt AI but whether their infrastructure can support it at the speed and scale the industry demands.  At Cannes Lions, running […]
title_es: NVIDIA impulsa operaciones autónomas en publicidad con IA
bajada: NVIDIA presenta en Cannes Lions cómo sus tecnologías están habilitando operaciones autónomas en publicidad y marketing. La industria transita desde adopción de IA hacia escala e infraestructura que soporte agentes completamente autónomos.
bajada_en: NVIDIA showcases at Cannes Lions how its technologies enable autonomous operations in advertising and marketing. The industry is shifting from AI adoption to infrastructure supporting fully autonomous agents.

title: Beyond LoRA: Can you beat the most popular fine-tuning technique?
title_es: Hugging Face explora técnicas fine-tuning más allá de LoRA
bajada: Hugging Face publica investigación examinando alternativas a LoRA, la técnica de fine-tuning más popular actualmente. El análisis busca métodos que superen las limitaciones de LoRA para adaptar modelos de manera más eficiente.
bajada_en: Hugging Face publishes research examining alternatives to LoRA, the most popular fine-tuning technique today. The analysis seeks methods that overcome LoRA's limitations for more efficient model adaptation.

title: Is it agentic enough? Benchmarking open models on your own tooling
title_es: Hugging Face: benchmarking modelos abiertos como agentes
bajada: Hugging Face publica herramientas para evaluar si modelos abiertos tienen suficientes capacidades agentic en tu tooling específico. El benchmark ayuda desarrolladores a seleccionar modelos apropiados para aplicaciones con agentes de IA.
bajada_en: Hugging Face publishes tools to evaluate whether open models have sufficient agentic capabilities for your specific tooling. The benchmark helps developers select appropriate models for AI agent applications.

title: France Advances Europe’s AI Future With NVIDIA Technologies
summary: A year ago at NVIDIA GTC Paris at VivaTech, France laid out plans to advance local AI — from new AI factories and national compute capacity to open frontier models and industrial platforms. Now, that AI infrastructure is coming online. AI agents are running in production, startups are deploying applications and the French AI ecosystem […]
title_es: Francia expande infraestructura IA con tecnología NVIDIA
bajada: Francia continúa implementación de su estrategia nacional de IA con infraestructura NVIDIA, incluyendo fábricas IA, capacidad de cómputo local y modelos abiertos. El ecosistema francés de IA produce agentes en producción y startups desplegando aplicaciones.
bajada_en: France continues deploying its national AI strategy using NVIDIA infrastructure, including AI factories, local compute capacity, and open models. The French AI ecosystem is running production agents and launching applications.

title: AI inference startup Baseten reportedly raising $1.5B months after its last mega-round
summary: Startup Baseten is reportedly close to finalizing a $1.5 billion round at a $13 billion as the “inference gold rush" marches on.
title_es: Baseten recauda $1.5B en nueva ronda de financiación
bajada: La startup de inferencia Baseten está finalizando una ronda de $1.5 mil millones a una valoración de $13 mil millones, consolidando la tendencia de inversión masiva en infraestructura de IA. Este movimiento subraya la demanda creciente por soluciones de inference optimizadas.
bajada_en: Inference startup Baseten is closing a $1.5 billion round at a $13 billion valuation, reinforcing the massive investment trend in AI infrastructure. This move underscores growing demand for optimized inference solutions.

title: OpenAI is bringing on some big guns in the lead-up to its IPO
summary: OpenAI is bulking up before its IPO, landing Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball in the same week.
title_es: OpenAI contrata expertos clave antes de su IPO
bajada: OpenAI fichó a Noam Shazeer (co-inventor de Transformers) de Google DeepMind y a Dean Ball, ex asesor de políticas de IA de Trump, en la misma semana. Los cambios de personal sugieren preparativos significativos antes de la salida a bolsa planificada.
bajada_en: OpenAI hired Noam Shazeer (Transformers co-inventor) from Google DeepMind and Dean Ball, former Trump AI policy official, in the same week. The personnel moves signal significant preparations ahead of OpenAI's planned IPO.

title: Amazon hopes to challenge Nvidia more directly by selling its AI chips
summary: AWS is in talks to sell its chips to other data centers. CEO Andy Jassy has said this represents a $50 billion opportunity for the company.
title_es: Amazon venderá chips de IA a otros data centers
bajada: AWS negocia vender sus chips de IA a otros centros de datos, representando una oportunidad de $50 mil millones según el CEO Andy Jassy. El movimiento posiciona a Amazon como competidor directo de Nvidia en el mercado de hardware para IA.
bajada_en: AWS is negotiating to sell its AI chips to other data centers, representing a $50 billion opportunity according to CEO Andy Jassy. The move positions Amazon as a direct Nvidia competitor in the AI hardware market.

title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
summary: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.
title_es: OpenAI agrega controles de gasto para empresas
bajada: OpenAI lanzó nuevas herramientas de análisis y controles de gasto para ChatGPT Enterprise, permitiendo que las organizaciones gestionen costos y escalen IA con mayor control. Esta mejora es relevante para equipos DevOps y líderes técnicos que necesitan monitorear el consumo de API.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched new analytics and spend controls for ChatGPT Enterprise, enabling organizations to manage costs and scale AI with better visibility. This update is relevant for DevOps teams and technical leaders who need to monitor API consumption.

title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
summary: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.
title_es: GPT-4.5 Instant mejora respuestas de salud en ChatGPT
bajada: OpenAI mejoró la capacidad de ChatGPT para responder preguntas de salud usando GPT-4.5 Instant, con mejor razonamiento y evaluaciones informadas por médicos. El cambio refleja el enfoque de OpenAI en usar IA en sectores regulados con mayor rigor.
bajada_en: OpenAI improved ChatGPT's health responses using GPT-4.5 Instant, featuring stronger reasoning and physician-informed evaluations. The update reflects OpenAI's focus on deploying AI in regulated sectors with greater rigor.

title: MosaicLeaks: Can your research agent keep a secret?
title_es: MosaicLeaks: vulnerabilidad en agentes de investigación
bajada: Hugging Face publicó un análisis sobre MosaicLeaks, una vulnerabilidad que compromete la confidencialidad en agentes de investigación basados en IA. El hallazgo es importante para developers que construyen sistemas autónomos con acceso a datos sensibles.
bajada_en: Hugging Face published an analysis on MosaicLeaks, a vulnerability compromising confidentiality in AI-powered research agents. The finding is important for developers building autonomous systems with access to sensitive data.

title: The White House Is Making Up Its Rules for AI in Real Time
summary: Anthropic still can’t distribute Claude Mythos or Fable 5 after running afoul of the Trump administration. But no one can say exactly what the company did wrong.
title_es: Trump limita distribución de modelos de Anthropic
bajada: Anthropic no puede distribuir Claude Mythos y Fable 5 tras conflicto con la administración Trump por controles de exportación, pero sin claridad sobre las infracciones específicas. La situación ilustra la incertidumbre regulatoria que enfrentan las empresas de IA bajo nuevas políticas de exportación.
bajada_en: Anthropic cannot distribute Claude Mythos and Fable 5 after running afoul of Trump administration export controls, but without clarity on specific violations. The situation illustrates regulatory uncertainty facing AI companies under new export policies.

title: Fearless Concurrency on the GPU: Safe GPU inference in Rust, competitive with vLLM/SGLang [R]
summary: I maintain cuTile Rust and just posted the paper "Fearless Concurrency on the GPU."As more GPU code gets AI-generated, the bottleneck moves from writing it to trusting it. cuTile Rust lets you write or generate GPU kernels whose memory safety and data-race freedom are verified by the compiler, through Rust's ownership and borrow checking. You get those guarantees by construction. It's a tile-based programming model that lowers to CUDA Tile IR, carrying Rust's ownership model across the launch boundary. You partition a mutable output into disjoint mutable sub-tensors, pass inputs as shared references, and write tile kernels with single-threaded semantics that the compiler maps to thread blocks.End to end, we built Grout, a Qwen3 inference engine, on cuTile Rust with Hugging Face. At batch-1 decode it reaches 171 tok/s for Qwen3-4B on an RTX 5090 and 82 tok/s for Qwen3-32B on a B200, competitive with vLLM and SGLang. Batch-1 decode is memory-bandwidth-bound, and Grout's throughput is consistent with our HBM roofline analysis.Many of Grout's kernels still use the unsafe path today, but they can be migrated to safe variants, providing a verifiable target for generated kernels. We've started a collection of such kernels in the cutile-kernels crate in the repo. If this is your thing, contributing safe variants helps grow a library of safe, high-performance kernels that future kernel synthesis can draw from.On the kernel side, the safety is effectively free. On a B200 the safe GEMM is within 0.3% of a hand-written low-level version (~92% of dense f16 peak), and element-wise hits ~7 TB/s, matching cuTile Python within measurement noise.Some additional caveats worth noting: Grout is batch-1 with a small set of supported models (a research case study, not a drop-in server), it's NVIDIA-only (lowers to Tile IR), and GEMM still slightly trails cuBLAS at some sizes.- Paper:https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15991- Code:https://github.com/nvlabs/cutile-rs- Grout:https://github.com/huggin
title_es: Rust seguro en GPU: inferencia verificada con cuTile
bajada: Investigadores presentaron cuTile Rust, un framework que trae memory safety a kernels de GPU mediante verificación en compilación, logrando rendimiento competitivo con vLLM/SGLang. El trabajo es relevante para developers que quieren garantías de seguridad en código GPU generado.
bajada_en: Researchers presented cuTile Rust, a framework bringing memory safety to GPU kernels through compiler verification, achieving performance competitive with vLLM/SGLang. The work is relevant for developers wanting safety guarantees in GPU-generated code.

title: How FERC’s Large-Load Interconnection Actions Help Address Grid Stress, Improve Affordability
summary: In a consequential grid infrastructure decision, the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) today issued a major milestone on large-load interconnection impacting how those building AI factories, semiconductor fabrication support systems and advanced manufacturing facilities can connect to the grid.  In the era of AI, which NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang has described as a […]
title_es: FERC facilita conexión de data centers de IA a la red
bajada: La Comisión Federal Reguladora de Energía emitió una decisión importante para simplificar la conexión de data centers de IA a la red eléctrica. El paso es crucial para la expansión de infraestructura de IA, permitiendo que nuevas instalaciones se conecten más fácilmente.
bajada_en: The Federal Energy Regulatory Commission issued a major decision simplifying the connection of AI data centers to the electrical grid. The move is crucial for AI infrastructure expansion, enabling new facilities to connect more easily.

title: Snap spins off AI video team into new company, Dotmo, due to costs
summary: The Snapchat maker is spinning off yet another internal unit. Dotmo will be composed of current Snap staff who are leaving the social media company to focus on AI video development.
title_es: Snap crea Dotmo, startup de video IA
bajada: Snap spinoff a su equipo de video IA formando Dotmo, una nueva compañía enfocada en desarrollo de IA para video. El movimiento refleja cómo las empresas están reorganizando estructuras internas para enfrentar costos de investigación en IA.
bajada_en: Snap spun off its AI video team to form Dotmo, a new company focused on AI-powered video development. The move reflects how companies are restructuring to manage high AI research costs.

title: Amazon employees say they’re facing termination for backing data center limits
summary: When three Amazon software engineers testified earlier this month at Seattle City Council hearings about data centers, they started their testimony by citing a city law barring employment discrimination over political speech. Now, they're accusing their employer of breaking that law by retaliating against them. On June 10th - one week after the hearing, and […]
title_es: Empleados de Amazon acusan represalias por testimonio sobre data centers
bajada: Tres ingenieros de Amazon enfrentan posible terminación tras testificar sobre límites a data centers ante el concejo de Seattle, acusando represalias. El caso toca tensiones entre política ambiental, activismo laboral e inversión en infraestructura de IA.
bajada_en: Three Amazon engineers face potential termination after testifying about data center limits to Seattle City Council, accusing retaliation. The case touches tensions between environmental policy, labor activism, and AI infrastructure investment.

title: Meta’s AI Workers Are Revolting, Peter Thiel’s Secret Society, and SBF’s Plea to Trump
summary: On today’s Uncanny Valley, we dive into the dysfunction in Meta’s newly formed AI unit and why it’s been driving already-low employee morale even further into the ground.
title_es: Malestar en la unidad de IA de Meta
bajada: Empleados de Meta en la nueva unidad de IA reportan disfunción significativa y baja moral, según reportes recientes. Los problemas internos en la reorganización de Meta reflejan desafíos de integración en equipos de IA.
bajada_en: Meta employees in the newly formed AI unit report significant dysfunction and low morale, according to recent reports. Internal issues at Meta's restructuring reflect integration challenges in AI teams.

title: Apple patches high-severity eavesdropping vulnerability in Beats Studio Buds
summary: The vulnerability, disclosed 12 months ago, affects multiple manufacturers.
title_es: Apple corrige vulnerabilidad en Beats Studio Buds
bajada: Apple lanzó un parche para una vulnerabilidad de severidad alta en Beats Studio Buds que permite escuchas no autorizadas, revelada hace 12 meses. El bug afecta múltiples fabricantes y es un recordatorio sobre seguridad en dispositivos IoT conectados.
bajada_en: Apple released a patch for a high-severity eavesdropping vulnerability in Beats Studio Buds, disclosed 12 months ago. The bug affects multiple manufacturers and is a reminder about IoT security.
